violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Use test strips on a regular basis to ensure proper sanitizing concentrations are maintained.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during the mechanical ware washing operation. QA based sanitizer used in dish machine.--Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Sanitizer concentration in dish machine not maintained at proper concentration.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. Current ventilation not sufficient to eliminate odors in men's restroom.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under shelving in walk in cooler.
